name: Gujchem Distillers India Limited
summary: Gujchem Distillers India Limited manufactures and sells Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL) and Extra Neutral Alcohol (ENA). The company's product portfolio includes whisky, brandy, rum, vodka, and gin, as well as ENA for use in the beverage industry. Gujchem Distillers India Limited is headquartered in Gujarat, India.
